name: the composite dispatch falls back to native enforcement when an optional routed tool is absent
command: printf 'resource "x" "y" {}\n' > ok.tf && RUN_TOOL_FORCE_ABSENT=1 bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/composite-dispatch.sh" --file ok.tf --tools checkov 2>e.txt; grep -q 'fallback=native' e.txt && grep -qE 'status=(green|red)' e.txt && echo dispatch-native-fallback 1>&2
